overview: A full-featured project management dashboard for Shree Adishakti Solar's booking list. Manage all solar project bookings with a compact table view and detailed record drawer covering 30+ fields including customer info, financials, installation milestones, and GST details.
features: Add, edit, and delete solar project bookings
Compact table with 7 key columns: SL No, Customer, Region, Status, KW, Sale Price, Pending Amount
Detail drawer showing all 30+ fields per project
Real-time search by customer name and region
Bulk select and bulk delete with confirmation
Summary stats: project counts by status, total pending amount, total KW
Pagination with configurable rows per page
